---
title: "Guillaume Noblet"
date: last-modified
resources:
  - .nojekyll
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/myself.jpg"
links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/gnoblet.bsky.social
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/gnoblet
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gnoblet/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:gnoblet@zaclys.net"
---
::: {#about-block}
:::

# Hey👋, I'm Guillaume, exploring a switch to a data journalist avenue

I specialized in research in humanitarian settings and data visualization.

From time to time I also write poetry. I'll be sharing some of this here as well as some data (viz) projects (coming soon, although no pressure for myself).


I was a former Research & Data Manager at [IMPACT Initiatives](https://impactinitiatives.org/).


This website is at very-early-stage of construction using Quarto and (many) changes are expected to come. What you will eventually find is still to be found. Blurry images and relative emptiness, maybe forever.


```{=html}
<div style="margin: 30px; text-align: center;">
  <a href="https://github.com/gnoblet" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://github.com/favicon.ico" alt="GitHub" style="width: 30px; height: 30px; margin: 10px;">
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-linkedin-username" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://www.linkedin.com/favicon.ico" alt="LinkedIn" style="width: 30px; height: 30px; margin: 10px;">
  </a>
  <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/your-bluesky-username" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-brands fa-bluesky" style="font-size: 30px; margin: 10px;"></i>
  </a>
</div>
```
